tool.name: ldap_enumerator
tool.description: LDAP enumeration for Active Directory reconnaissance and user/group discovery.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test for anonymous LDAP bind - Enumerate domain users and groups - Find computers in the domain - Discover service accounts (SPNs) - Extract domain information - Find privileged accounts

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The enumeration action to perform: - anonymous_bind: Test for anonymous LDAP access - enumerate_users: List domain users - enumerate_groups: List domain groups - find_computers: Find domain computers - find_spns: Find service principal names - get_domain_info: Get domain configuration - full_enum: Run all enumeration checks

parameter.name: base_dn
parameter.description: Base DN for LDAP queries (e.g., DC=domain,DC=local)

returns.description: Enumeration results with users, groups, and domain information

tool.examples:
# Test anonymous bind
anonymous_bind dc01.domain.local
# Enumerate users with credentials
enumerate_users 10.0.0.1 DC=domain,DC=local user@domain.local password123
# Find service accounts
find_spns dc01.domain.local DC=domain,DC=local
